[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001101 3
1 00000010 1
2 00000010 1
3 00000011 2
4 00101001 3
5 00100000 1
6 00000110 2
7 11001100 4
